title: stelis carta
intro: Stelis carta is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Peru, where it is believed to possess medicinal properties due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Stelis carta are attributed to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. Stelis carta is typically prepared as a tea infusion or a tincture, which can be used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive disorders.
